diff.summary:
diff --git a/elixir/README.md b/elixir/README.md
index 25f5411874899ee820b60ab47c087d00ece7e2b2..f6a0b27f358f38c2b7e310c6aa597f106f980930
--- a/elixir/README.md
+++ b/elixir/README.md
@@ -152,6 +152,7 @@
   - `codex.thread_sandbox` defaults to `workspace-write`
   - `codex.turn_sandbox_policy` defaults to a `workspaceWrite` policy rooted at the current issue workspace
 - Supported `codex.approval_policy` values depend on the targeted Codex app-server version. In the current local Codex schema, string values include `untrusted`, `on-failure`, `on-request`, and `never`, and object-form `reject` is also supported.
+- BOS AgentRun turns always use `untrusted` command classification so Symphony can inspect commands before launch. Direct `gh` execution and detectable `api.github.com` REST/GraphQL access are denied and durably audited with the corresponding `bos-mcp` operation; ordinary Git transport remains available. This does not govern host-side workspace hooks or human administration.
 - Supported `codex.thread_sandbox` values: `read-only`, `workspace-write`, `danger-full-access`.
 - When `codex.turn_sandbox_policy` is set explicitly, Symphony passes the map through to Codex
   unchanged. Compatibility then depends on the targeted Codex app-server version rather than local
diff --git a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
index dead79b72eed9132bac66360d373f8fce0b8b478..da1a00b4ca8e6cc166dcb2218744a6aea152f586
--- a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
+++ b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/audit/outbox.ex
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@
                          "agent.turn_cancelled",
                          "command.started",
                          "command.completed",
+                         "command.policy_blocked",
                          "tool.requested",
                          "tool.confirmed"
                        ])
@@ -531,6 +532,9 @@
         |> codex_item()
         |> auditable_item?()
 
+      method == "bos/commandPolicy/blocked" ->
+        true
+
       true ->
         false
     end
@@ -554,6 +558,7 @@
   defp event_type("turn/completed", _payload), do: "agent.turn_completed"
   defp event_type("turn/failed", _payload), do: "agent.turn_failed"
   defp event_type("turn/cancelled", _payload), do: "agent.turn_cancelled"
+  defp event_type("bos/commandPolicy/blocked", _payload), do: "command.policy_blocked"
   defp event_type(_method, _payload), do: "agent.progress_recorded"
 
   defp item_event_type(payload, suffix) do
@@ -574,6 +579,7 @@
 
   defp event_status(%{event: :turn_failed}), do: "failed"
   defp event_status(%{event: :turn_cancelled}), do: "cancelled"
+  defp event_status(%{event: :command_policy_blocked}), do: "blocked"
   defp event_status(_update), do: "completed"
 
   defp summary(method, %{"command" => command} = payload)
diff --git a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/app_server.ex b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/app_server.ex
index 7e23638879a409efcdb8fc957df9a4cef746be67..7f914010daaa00ef023fc1a93660f8176249e74e
--- a/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/app_server.ex
+++ b/elixir/lib/symphony_elixir/codex/app_server.ex
@@ -4,7 +4,7 @@
   """
 
   require Logger
-  alias SymphonyElixir.{Codex.DynamicTool, Config, PathSafety, SSH}
+  alias SymphonyElixir.{Codex.CommandPolicy, Codex.DynamicTool, Config, PathSafety, SSH}
 
   @initialize_id 1
   @thread_start_id 2
@@ -94,7 +94,9 @@
         DynamicTool.execute(tool, arguments, dynamic_tool_binding, issue: issue)
       end)
 
-    case start_turn(port, thread_id, prompt, issue, workspace, approval_policy, turn_sandbox_policy) do
+    turn_approval_policy = if bos_agent_run?(issue), do: "untrusted", else: approval_policy
+
+    case start_turn(port, thread_id, prompt, issue, workspace, turn_approval_policy, turn_sandbox_policy) do
       {:ok, turn_id} ->
         session_id = "#{thread_id}-#{turn_id}"
         Logger.info("Codex session started for #{issue_context(issue)} session_id=#{session_id}")
@@ -110,7 +112,7 @@
           metadata
         )
 
-        case await_turn_completion(port, on_message, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests) do
+        case await_turn_completion(port, on_message, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue) do
           {:ok, result} ->
             Logger.info("Codex session completed for #{issue_context(issue)} session_id=#{session_id}")
 
@@ -395,22 +397,23 @@
     end
   end
 
-  defp await_turn_completion(port, on_message, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests) do
+  defp await_turn_completion(port, on_message, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue) do
     receive_loop(
       port,
       on_message,
       Config.settings!().codex.turn_timeout_ms,
       "",
       tool_executor,
-      auto_approve_requests
+      auto_approve_requests,
+      issue
     )
   end
 
-  defp receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, pending_line, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests) do
+  defp receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, pending_line, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue) do
     receive do
       {^port, {:data, {:eol, chunk}}} ->
         complete_line = pending_line <> to_string(chunk)
-        handle_incoming(port, on_message, complete_line, timeout_ms, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests)
+        handle_incoming(port, on_message, complete_line, timeout_ms, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue)
 
       {^port, {:data, {:noeol, chunk}}} ->
         receive_loop(
@@ -419,7 +422,8 @@
           timeout_ms,
           pending_line <> to_string(chunk),
           tool_executor,
-          auto_approve_requests
+          auto_approve_requests,
+          issue
         )
 
       {^port, {:exit_status, status}} ->
@@ -430,7 +434,7 @@
     end
   end
 
-  defp handle_incoming(port, on_message, data, timeout_ms, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests) do
+  defp handle_incoming(port, on_message, data, timeout_ms, tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue) do
     payload_string = to_string(data)
 
     case Jason.decode(payload_string) do
@@ -472,7 +476,8 @@
           method,
           timeout_ms,
           tool_executor,
-          auto_approve_requests
+          auto_approve_requests,
+          issue
         )
 
       {:ok, payload} ->
@@ -486,7 +491,7 @@
           metadata_from_message(port, payload)
         )
 
-        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests)
+        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue)
 
       {:error, _reason} ->
         log_non_json_stream_line(payload_string, "turn stream")
@@ -503,7 +508,7 @@
           )
         end
 
-        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests)
+        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue)
     end
   end
 
@@ -528,7 +533,8 @@
          method,
          timeout_ms,
          tool_executor,
-         auto_approve_requests
+         auto_approve_requests,
+         issue
        ) do
     metadata = metadata_from_message(port, payload)
 
@@ -540,7 +546,8 @@
            on_message,
            metadata,
            tool_executor,
-           auto_approve_requests
+           auto_approve_requests,
+           issue
          ) do
       :input_required ->
         emit_message(
@@ -553,7 +560,7 @@
         {:error, {:turn_input_required, payload}}
 
       :approved ->
-        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests)
+        receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue)
 
       :approval_required ->
         emit_message(
@@ -587,7 +594,7 @@
           )
 
           Logger.debug("Codex notification: #{inspect(method)}")
-          receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests)
+          receive_loop(port, on_message, timeout_ms, "", tool_executor, auto_approve_requests, issue)

summary: Codex command completed: /bin/bash -lc 'mise exec -- mix deps.get' (exit 0)
